title: Resinous Arabian Corn Taco
description: A resinous, aerated taco with low-glycemic ingredients, featuring corn tortillas, grilled chicken, cauliflower, and aromatic Middle Eastern spices.
instructions: Remove the chicken from the grill and let it rest for 5 minutes before shredding.
In a bowl, combine the shredded chicken, cauliflower, onion, cilantro, sumac, za'atar, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Drizzle the mixture with olive oil and lemon juice and stir until evenly coated.
Warm the corn tortillas in a dry skillet over medium heat for 30 seconds on each side, or wrap them in foil and heat in the oven for 5 minutes.
Divide the seasoned chicken mixture evenly among the tortillas, placing a heaping spoonful on each.
Fold the edges to form small tacos and place them on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
Bake the tacos at 375°F for 5 minutes to meld the flavors.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly, then drizzle a thin layer of olive oil for an extra resinous finish.
Serve hot or store in airtight containers for meal prep, refrigerating up to 3 days.
